<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\NorwegianBokmal; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Pattern; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Substitution; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Transformation; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Word; class Inflectible { /** @return Transformation[] */ public static function getSingular(): iterable { yield new Transformation(new Pattern('/re$/i'), 'r'); yield new Transformation(new Pattern('/er$/i'), ''); } /** @return Transformation[] */ public static function getPlural(): iterable { yield new Transformation(new Pattern('/e$/i'), 'er'); yield new Transformation(new Pattern('/r$/i'), 're'); yield new Transformation(new Pattern('/$/'), 'er'); } /** @return Substitution[] */ public static function getIrregular(): iterable { yield new Substitution(new Word('konto'), new Word('konti')); } }
